# Jurryi Tech - Complete Platform Documentation

> AI-Powered Patent Drafting & Prosecution Infrastructure

## Overview

Jurryi is the world's first privacy-enabled AI infrastructure purpose-built for patent attorney teams. Our platform is trained on patent prosecution history and engineered to streamline every step of the patent lifecycle — from initial invention disclosure through final grant.

## Products & Services

### 1. AI Patent Drafter
The AI Patent Drafter is Jurryi's flagship product for automated patent application drafting.

**Features:**
- Generate complete patent specifications from invention disclosures
- Auto-generate claims (independent + dependent), detailed descriptions, abstracts
- Support for utility patents, design patents, and provisional applications
- Multi-jurisdiction formatting: USPTO, EPO, WIPO (PCT), Indian Patent Office, JPO, KIPO
- Section 3(k) compliance checking for Indian software patents
- Automatic drawing generation and figure references
- CPC/IPC classification suggestion
- Prior art-aware drafting that strengthens novelty arguments

**Use Cases:**
- Patent attorneys drafting new applications
- In-house IP teams processing invention disclosures
- Law firms scaling patent prosecution output
- Corporate R&D teams protecting innovations

### 2. Prior Art Search Engine
AI-powered prior art discovery and analysis platform.

**Features:**
- Semantic search across 150M+ patent documents worldwide
- Non-patent literature (NPL) search integration
- Automated novelty assessment and patentability scoring
- Visual patent landscape mapping
- Claim-by-claim prior art mapping
- Export-ready search reports for client delivery

### 3. Office Action Response Generator
Automated analysis and response drafting for patent office actions.

**Features:**
- Parse and categorize office action rejections (35 USC 101, 102, 103, 112)
- AI-suggested claim amendments to overcome rejections
- Argument generation based on prosecution history and case law
- Examiner-specific strategy recommendations
- Response formatting per patent office requirements
- Track office action deadlines and prosecution timelines

### 4. Claim Amendment Engine
Precision tool for patent claim drafting and optimization.

**Features:**
- Independent and dependent claim generation
- Claim tree visualization
- Broadest reasonable interpretation analysis
- Means-plus-function claim detection
- Multi-dependent claim optimization
- Jurisdiction-specific claim formatting

### 5. Portfolio Analytics Dashboard
Enterprise patent portfolio intelligence and management.

**Features:**
- Real-time prosecution status tracking
- Cost analytics and budget forecasting
- Allowance rate benchmarking
- Technology area clustering
- Competitive patent landscape analysis
- Custom reporting and data export

### 6. Examiner Intelligence System
USPTO patent examiner behavior analytics and prosecution strategy optimization.

**Features:**
- Examiner-specific allowance rates and rejection patterns
- Art unit analytics and technology center insights
- Average prosecution timeline predictions
- Interview success rate tracking
- Examiner comparison and assignment analysis
- Historical prosecution outcome data

## Target Audience
- Patent attorneys and agents
- Intellectual property law firms (AmLaw, boutique IP firms)
- Corporate in-house IP departments
- Patent prosecution teams
- Technology companies with large patent portfolios
- Pharmaceutical and biotech companies
- Universities and research institutions

## Technology
- Enterprise-grade security (SOC 2 compliant)
- Privacy-first architecture — client data never used for model training
- On-premise deployment options available
- API access for integration with existing patent management systems (CPI, Anaqua, Dennemeyer)
- Multi-language support for international filings

## Competitive Differentiators
- Only platform with multi-jurisdiction patent drafting (US, EP, India, PCT) in a single tool
- Examiner intelligence system for strategic prosecution planning
- Privacy-enabled AI that never trains on client data
- Built specifically for patent prosecution, not adapted from general-purpose AI
- End-to-end platform covering the full patent lifecycle

## Industry Context
Jurryi operates in the Legal Technology (LegalTech) and Patent Technology (PatentTech) space, specifically focused on:
- AI patent drafting software
- Patent prosecution automation
- Intellectual property management
- Legal AI tools for patent attorneys
- Patent claim generation and optimization
- Prior art search and analysis
- Office action response automation
- Patent portfolio analytics and intelligence
